provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against pi. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Add an ingress block to the aws_security_group resource:
ingress {
  from_port   = 443
  to_port     = 443
  protocol    = "tcp"
  cidr_blocks = [var.office_cidr]
}
Then run terraform plan to confirm only this rule changes.
